title: heteropappus biennis
intro: Heteropappus biennis, also known as Heterotheca latifolia, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is native to North America and is commonly found in prairies and open woods. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. Heteropappus biennis can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations.
